summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.view.editors; import org.eclipse.ui.PartInitException; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.model.orchestration.Orchestrator; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.view.editors.pages.TestsPage; public class TestsPageFactory { public static TestsPage createTestsPage(MultiPageEditor editor, Orchestrator orchestrator) throws PartInitException { TestsPage page = new TestsPage(editor.getContainer(), editor, orchestrator); int index = editor.addPage(page); editor.setPageText(index, "Tests"); return page; } }
